creator: Sarah Perez
title: (No AI) Marked-up Mac minis flood eBay amid shortages driven by AI
dc:creator: Sarah Perez
content: Apple’s sold-out Mac mini is spawning marked-up eBay listings as demand surges for the compact desktop, now favored for running local AI models and tools.
contentSnippet: Apple’s sold-out Mac mini is spawning marked-up eBay listings as demand surges for the compact desktop, now favored for running local AI models and tools.

creator: TechCrunch Events
title: (No AI) Uber CTO Praveen Neppalli Naga joins stacked StrictlyVC SF lineup for April 30 event
dc:creator: TechCrunch Events
content: Surprise! StrictlyVC San Francisco, which will kick off this year’s events lineup for TechCrunch on April 30 at the Sentro Filipino Cultural Center, is getting a new addition to its increasingly stacked lineup of speakers. Uber CTO Praveen Neppalli Naga will join the rest of the lineup to discuss operating at scale in the age of AI.
contentSnippet: Surprise! StrictlyVC San Francisco, which will kick off this year’s events lineup for TechCrunch on April 30 at the Sentro Filipino Cultural Center, is getting a new addition to its increasingly stacked lineup of speakers. title: (No AI) AirPods, Touch Bars, and the rest of Tim Cook’s legacy
author: David Pierce
content:
![](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/04/VRG_VST_0424_Site.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

We knew at some point Tim Cook would step down from his position as Apple's CEO. Over the last year, it has become increasingly obvious that John Ternus was his likely successor. The news this week was still a surprise, though - and this year's succession could lead to [some important changes](https://www.theverge.com/tech/916585/tim-cook-apple-new-era) at the most influential company in tech.

![](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2025/11/Vergecast-Tile-Large.jpeg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

_Verge_ subscribers, don't forget you get exclusive access to ad-free _Vergecast_ wherever you get your podcasts. Head [here](https://www.theverge.com/account/podcasts). Not a subscriber? You can [sign up here](https://www.theverge.com/subscribe).

On [this episode of _The Vergecast_](https://pod.link/vergecast), David and Nilay are joined by _[Daring Fireball](https://daringfireball.net/)_'s John Gruber to talk about their reactions to the news, the ([mostly](https://www.theverge.com/tech/916228/tim-cook-i-am-healthy-my-energy-is-high-and-i-plan-to-be-in-this-new-role-for-a-long-time) …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/podcast/917965/apple-ceo-cook-ternus-transition)

title: (No AI) Musk vs. Altman is here, and it’s going to get messy
author: Elizabeth Lopatto
content:
![Elon Musk is jumping in front of a courthouse while Sam Altman looks puzzled](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/04/268474_musk_vs_altman_CVirginia2.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Might as well jump, as the poet David Lee Roth once said. | Image: Cath Virginia / The Verge

Elon Musk cofounded OpenAI, and then flounced off in a huff when he wasn't anointed CEO, leaving Sam Altman as the last power-hungry man standing. Now, Musk is back with a lawsuit, and a trial is scheduled to start in Oakland, California, on April 27th. _Theoretically_, it's a legal case about whether OpenAI defrauded Musk. But that's not really what we're all doing here. This is about mess.

Over the past couple of years, Musk's legal theories for punishing OpenAI have run the gamut from breach of contract to unfair business practices to false advertising. Now, he and Altman will be getting called to the stand at a particularly delicate time …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/917755/musk-altman-openai-xai-gossip)

creator: Ej Dickson
title: (No AI) These AI Thirst Trap Creators Say They’re Misunderstood
dc:creator: Ej Dickson
content: A viral red carpet moment shone light on a group of hunky Instagram influencers—and the followers who are too horny to care that they’re not real.
